svg.title: How Skill Manager unifies skills across harnesses
svg.desc: Before adoption, each harness keeps its own copy of the same skill, and over time the copies drift to different versions. After adoption, Skill Manager keeps one canonical copy in a shared store and each enabled harness links back to it; per-harness toggles control which harnesses see the skill.
svg.text: Each harness keeps its own copy
Same skill, four local copies — versions diverging
One canonical copy, harnesses link to it
